title: Flame!
description: Updates the torches to look more like the Redstone torch but still keeping the Redstone torch unique.
body:
**Features**

- All new torch textures
- New modles for soul, copper, and regular torches
- 3D modles for all torches when in hand
- New animated particle when held for all torches

**Recommended Packs**

- Visual Effects+ (Resourcepack)
- Not Enough Animations (Mod)
